mapper.insert: insert into `product` (name, description, image, price, stock, status, create_time) values (#{name}, #{description}, #{image}, #{price}, #{stock}, #{status}, NOW())
mapper.update: update `product` set name = #{name}, description = #{description}, image = #{image}, price = #{price}, stock = #{stock}, status = #{status}, create_time = NOW(), is_deleted = #{isDeleted} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select * from `product` where name like concat('%',#{name},'%') and is_deleted = 0
